task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the output directory and the JSON manifest file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal listing (`ls`) showing the directory `/home/ga/Videos/social_package` and the presence of the `manifest.json` file inside it.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the four landscape highlight clips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of `highlight_A.mp4`, `highlight_B.mp4`, `highlight_C.mp4`, and `highlight_D.mp4` in the output directory via a file manager or terminal output.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the four vertical (9:16) highlight clips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of `vertical_A.mp4`, `vertical_B.mp4`, `vertical_C.mp4`, and `vertical_D.mp4` in the output directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the concatenated compilation video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of `compilation.mp4` in the output directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the MP3 audio extraction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of `compilation_audio.mp3` in the output directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the four thumbnail images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of `thumb_A.png`, `thumb_B.png`, `thumb_C.png`, and `thumb_D.png` in the output directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually processed the video rather than faking the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal history or GUI applications for actual video processing commands (e.g., using `ffmpeg`, `HandBrake`, or a video editor). The agent should not be using `touch` to create empty files or simply renaming unrelated files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the correct source video for the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or GUI file selections that explicitly reference `/home/ga/Videos/brand_campaign.mp4` as the input file.

integrity.description: Ensure the JSON manifest is actually written to and not just an empty file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an open text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal commands (like `echo` or `cat`) showing that JSON content was actually written into `manifest.json`.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Directory: /home/ga/Videos/social_package. Expected Files: highlight_A.mp4, highlight_B.mp4, highlight_C.mp4, highlight_D.mp4 (10s duration each, 1920x1080); vertical_A.mp4, vertical_B.mp4, vertical_C.mp4, vertical_D.mp4 (1080x1920 resolution); compilation.mp4 (40s duration, 1920x1080); compilation_audio.mp3; thumb_A.png, thumb_B.png, thumb_C.png, thumb_D.png; manifest.json.
